turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Tony's Pizza, Austin. What can I get started for you?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, quick question — my daughter has a serious gluten allergy. Do you have anything safe for her?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Honestly, no — we mix wheat dough on the same prep table all day, so I can't promise anything is safe enough for a serious allergy. I don't want to guess on this one.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay, that's fair. Thanks for being straight about it.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course. If you want, I can have the manager call you back with what we'd actually be able to do for pickup. Want me to set that up?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. What's a good number?
